comment.body: Comments weren't triggering, now they should.
Comments now trigger, and should log this change in comment body.

body.from: Comments weren't triggering, now they should.

comment.body: Hash organized diffs should now be available.

body.from: Comments now trigger, and should log this change in comment body.

comment.body:
refactor(audit): simplify LAST_100 columns and use comment-specific links
    
    Streamline LAST_100 readability and link precision.
    
    - remove Details column from LAST_100 table
    - render Issue column as linked issue number only
    - render Milestone column as linked milestone number only
    - prefer comment.html_url for target links (issuecomment anchors)
      with fallback to issue/milestone URLs
    
    Detailed before/after content remains available via per-event artifact links in the Event ID column.

body.from: Hash organized diffs should now be available.

comment.body:
fix(audit): prefix every edited comment line in diff block
    
    Update comment body diff rendering to apply +/- prefixes to each line for multiline edits.
    
    - replace single printf lines with line-wise sed prefixing
    - preserve fenced diff block format for GitHub red/green rendering
    
    This ensures multiline comment edits are fully represented in per-event markdown diffs.

body.from:
refactor(audit): simplify LAST_100 columns and use comment-specific links
    
    Streamline LAST_100 readability and link precision.
    
    - remove Details column from LAST_100 table
    - render Issue column as linked issue number only
    - render Milestone column as linked milestone number only
    - prefer comment.html_url for target links (issuecomment anchors)
      with fallback to issue/milestone URLs
    
    Detailed before/after content remains available via per-event artifact links in the Event ID column.

milestone.title: NonPriority
milestone.description: Just a placeholder for issues that should be fixed, but not currently within an existing milestone.

milestone.title: NonPriority
milestone.description: Just a placeholder for issues that should be fixed, but not currently within an existing milestone.

milestone.title: PermissionHandlingUpdatesTEST
milestone.description:
# Milestone Summary
Initializing  publishers blocks the main thread  leading to an unresponsive application.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Objective

Use **Kotlin Coroutines** to eliminate main thread blocking and enable
smooth publisher initialization.

# Publisher Initialization Blocking UI

## Current State

After the device connects, the app calls:

`onSerialReady()`

Inside this method:

`publisherManager.initializePublishers()`
`publisherManager.startPublishers()`

During initialization, the app:

-   Requests several permissions
-   Waits for them to be granted

This process blocks the **UI completely**, causing the app to become
unresponsive.

## Expected State

In `AbcvlibActivity`:

-   Move the `onSerialReady` callback execution context to the **Default
    Dispatcher**

This will:

-   Allow publishers to initialize asynchronously
-   Handle permission requests without blocking the UI

TEST
